UMass Boston Computer Science Department Website
Base URL: https://www.cs.umb.edu/

Description:
Official site for the UMass Boston Computer Science Department. Includes courses, programs, faculty, research, and resources.

Sections:
Courses: https://www.cs.umb.edu/academics/courses/
Programs: https://www.cs.umb.edu/academics/
People: https://www.cs.umb.edu/people/
Research: https://www.cs.umb.edu/research/
Resources: https://www.cs.umb.edu/resources/

Notes:
- Structured data is embedded on all pages using JSON-LD
- Course and program data follow consistent schema formats
